---
title: "Dr. Leonardo Capitani"
toc: false
image: Leonardo_SYKE.JPG
about: 
 template: trestles
 image-shape: round
 image-width: 20em
 links:
    - text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/LeoCapitani7
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/leomarameo7
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:leocapi07@gmail.com
theme:
  light: flatly
  dark: darkly
---

I am a quantitative ecologist with expertise on food-web modelling and Bayesian data analysis.

### Education

-   PhD in Ecology \| June 2017 - June 2021

    Universidade Federal do Rio Grande do Norte \| Natal, Brazil

-   MSc in Ecology \| April 2015 - May 2017

    Universidade Federal do Rio Grande do Sul \| Porto Alegre, Brazil

-   B.A in Enviromental Sciencies \| Sept 2008 - Sept 2014

    Universitat de Barcelona \| Barcelona, Spain
